violations.text: Container observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was emptied at the time of inspection. Establishment is to clean and sanitize ice machine before using. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024
